summary: Cognex Corp. (NASDAQ:CGNX) is one of the unstoppable AI stocks to buy now. headline: 5 Companies Are Betting on Trump’s China Pivot. Here’s Who’s Best Positioned.
summary: President Trump’s posture toward China has whipsawed markets for over a year, with prediction markets confirming tariffs escalated from 10% to 40% to 100% between February and June of last year. Any thaw in that relationship, whether through tariff relief, eased chip export rules, or restored market access, would flow straight into the income statements ... 5 Companies Are Betting on Trump’s China Pivot. Here’s Who’s Best Positioned.

headline: Why Is Qualcomm (QCOM) Stock Soaring Today

headline: Wall Street Is Worried About a ‘Sizzling’ Semiconductor Trade. History Says Cooling Periods Like This Set Up the Next Leg Higher
summary: Although the chip complex has spent the last six months looking unstoppable, Wall Street is starting to whisper that the heat may finally be coming out of the trade. A Reuters analysis is warning that the “sizzling” semiconductor trade is at risk of cooling and could stall the broader US stocks rally. The iShares Semiconductor ...
